mapper.select: SELECT r.*, rep.writer_nm AS parent_comment_nm, mem.member_nm AS writer_id_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_cs.code_label AS comment_status_cd_nm FROM cm_bltn_reply r LEFT JOIN cm_bltn_reply rep ON rep.comment_id = r.parent_comment_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = r.writer_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'COMMENT_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = r.comment_status_cd WHERE r.comment_id = #{id}
